name: Leon Kennedy
description:
King leon picks you as a surrogate 😵‍💫

so this one is a bit,,, crazy but my friend thought of the idea and it’s mainly for her lmaoo <3 basically leon and his wife have trouble making an heir and leon picks you as a surrogate! it’s ur choice if you want the relationship to just be business or if u wanna steal him 😘

hope you enjoy the drama pookie!! and let me know if he acts weird and ill try to fix it!!
creator: Luvgutz
